productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Formal Brown Shoe
description: Perfect for those picnics, this brown high-ankle desert boot is a comfort level every man must incorporate in his wardrobe. With a wide foot section and amazing grip sole, it's all that you need to help you walk comfortably even on undulating terrain.Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style High-ankle for upper foot protection Leather heel cup and side overlays for durability and added shoe structure Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Wide toe for easy movement of the forefoot Long leather tongue with a fabric inner lining for a comfortable, abrasion-free wear Haul loop in leather to easily carry the shoes on your back pack when on vacations Upper stitched to the midsole in contrast colour thread for maximum durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete fabric inner lining for maximum breathability Padded leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a complete modified herringbone pattern for maximum grip and traction on all terrain Raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
